content.body:
- leo init now runs an interactive wizard (runtime, language, profile,
  autonomy, core source) — skip with -y or --runtime flag
- leo update syncs core-scoped KB docs and schema from a leo-core clone
  into the project's .leo/ directory (closes #26)
- Updated 8 KB docs to reflect current architecture (Go CLI, Leo ↔
  Specialists model, no Managers layer)
- Converted hiring-loop, md-fallback, migration-progress to historical
  decision docs
- Removed legacy files: install.sh, .claude/context/
- Updated README, CONTRIBUTING, CLAUDE.md, project-config.yml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cli): add interactive onboarding, leo update, and repo-wide cleanup
